name: Aternos
description: Completely free Minecraft server hosting. Supports vanilla, Spigot, Paper, Forge, Fabric, and Bedrock — no credit card needed.

name: Chunky
description: Path-tracing renderer for Minecraft. Create stunning, photorealistic screenshots and renders of your builds with accurate lighting, shadows, and reflections.

name: Hangar
description: Official PaperMC plugin repository. Browse and publish plugins specifically verified for Paper and Velocity servers.

name: Hypixel
description: The largest Minecraft network. Play BedWars, SkyWars, SkyBlock, and dozens of other minigames on hypixel.net.

name: MC Packs
description: Download Minecraft resource packs, texture packs, and shader files for all versions. Organised and easy to browse.

name: MC Statistics
description: Monitor Minecraft server player counts, version history, and uptime statistics over time. Great for tracking growth.

name: MC Utils
description: Toolkit for Minecraft server admins. Features UUID lookup, skin renderer, MOTD builder, and server status checker.

name: mcsrvstat.us
description: Minecraft server status checker API and website. Get player counts, MOTD, icon, and version info for any Java or Bedrock server. Free public API available.

name: Minehut
description: Free Minecraft server hosting with an online community. Quick setup for Java edition servers with plugin support.

name: Modrinth
description: Open-source Minecraft mod repository with fast downloads, a clean interface, and support for Fabric, Forge, and Quilt.

name: PaperMC
description: High-performance Minecraft server software built on Spigot. Faster, more configurable, and with better plugin API.

name: Planet Minecraft
description: Community hub for Minecraft content. Download maps, skins, texture packs, and servers shared by creators worldwide.

name: Purpur
description: Highly configurable Minecraft server fork based on Paper. Adds hundreds of gameplay tweaks and performance improvements. Fully compatible with Bukkit/Paper plugins.

name: SpigotMC
description: The largest source of Minecraft server plugins. Browse, download, and publish plugins for Spigot and Bukkit servers.

name: Velocity
description: The modern, high-performance Minecraft proxy server. Connects multiple backend servers under one IP with better performance and security than BungeeCord.

name: SpigotMC
description: The primary marketplace for Minecraft server plugins and resources. Thousands of free and premium plugins for any gamemode.

name: PaperMC
description: High-performance Minecraft server software, a fork of Spigot. Faster, more stable, and the standard choice for modern servers.

name: BlueMap
description: Free 3D web map of your Minecraft server in real time. View your world from any browser without launching the game.

name: CurseForge
description: Largest hub for Minecraft mods, modpacks, and resource packs. The standard download source for modded play.

name: Modrinth
description: Fast, modern, open-source mod platform for Minecraft. Cleaner interface and better search than older alternatives.

name: Planet Minecraft
description: Community hub for skins, maps, builds, and texture packs. Browse and download thousands of fan creations.

name: Aternos
description: Free Minecraft server hosting with no time limits. Great for casual servers without monthly hosting costs.

name: NameMC
description: Look up Minecraft usernames, skins, and capes. Track name history and find available names to claim.

name: Minecraft Wiki
description: The definitive community-edited wiki covering every block, mob, mechanic, and update in Minecraft.

name: Chunkbase
description: Seed map viewer and generator tools for finding biomes, structures, and slime chunks before you even load the world.

name: Nexoria Realm
description: My Minecraft Java SMP server. Community-driven survival with custom plugins. Connect at play.nexoriarealm.xyz.
